one_time_description: Matured phase Replacement Reserve Fund transfer - non-recurring one-time transfer
economic_notes: Samahquam receives gaming revenue through BCFN Gaming Revenue Limited Partnership ($577,220). Community Trust Fund holds marketable securities at fair value of $1,459,673. Ottawa Trust Funds held in Consolidated Revenue Fund of Government of Canada totaling $432,960.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Six funds consolidated line-by-line: Operating Fund, Social Housing Fund, Capital Fund, Trust Fund, Community Trust Fund, Enterprise Fund. Enterprise Fund appears to be a GBE accounted for under modified equity but shows nil activity in statements. No schedule of remuneration included. Honoraria of $61,000 paid in Band Programs. Former employee fraud recovery outstanding per Note 5. Assets under construction of $1,108,404 carried at cost with no amortization. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,473,514) + Province of BC ($189,680) + FNHA ($79,790) + CMHC ($18,139) + New Relationship Trust ($17,900) + FNESC ($1,494) + BC Hydro ($8,774) + Southern Stl'alt'imx Health Society ($60,149) + MSTA ($60,384) = $1,909,824; however BC Hydro and some societies may not be government; conservative calculation using clearly governmental sources. Restricted cash includes BMO-FCRSA Funds of $1,040,826.
